channel.title: Camelia DB on Camelia D.B.
channel.description: Recent content in Camelia DB on Camelia D.B.

item.title: A Typology of Decision-Making Tasks for Visualization
item.author: camelia_daniela.brumar@tufts.edu (Camelia D. Brumar)
item.description: This paper presents a typology of decision-making tasks for visualization that breaks complex decision processes into create, activate, and choose operations, giving designers a clearer language for analyzing and supporting decision-making in visualization systems.

item.title: About Me
item.author: camelia_daniela.brumar@tufts.edu (Camelia D. Brumar)
item.description: I’m a PhD Candidate in Computer Science working with Remco Chang in the Visual Analytics Lab @ Tufts University (VALT), a visiting PhD student in the Visual Computing Group @ Harvard University, and the co-founder and organizer of Boston Vis.
